market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Experience the vibrant NE1 area in this fully furnished city studio or apartment. With space for up to four guests, our property offers easy access to [insert nearby landmarks or amenities based on actual location]. While guests praise our location (though current 3.71 rating shows room for improvement), our £663 rate includes [add specific features like 'spacious living area', 'fully equipped kitchen', or 'luxurious bathroom']. We're just starting out as a new host (0 years hosting) but are committed to providing exceptional service. Book directly with us to unlock [insert unique selling points about the property] while rates are still [insert price justification].
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize a professionally staged living room photo first to create instant visual appeal, followed by property exterior shots to reinforce location advantage.
key_diagnosis: £663 rate is 329% above median £154.60 cohort pricing while occupancy is 15.2% vs median 47.8% (strong price/occupancy misalignment)
0 years hosting experience with 7 small reviews (3.71 rating suggests need for service improvements)
Missing all explicit amenity listings despite market emphasis on Outdoor, Parking, and Entertainment categories
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £663 rate is 329% higher than the central London median while occupancy (15.2%) trails the cohort average (47.8%) - this price-occupancy gap shows significant monetization upside.
